scripts.postbuild: npx tsc medusa-config.ts --module commonjs || true; mkdir -p .medusa/server; cp medusa-config.js package.json .medusa/server/ 2>/dev/null || true; cp -a dist/. .medusa/server/ 2>/dev/null || true; ADMIN_HTML=$(find . -name index.html 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v '\.medusa' | grep -v storefront | head -n 1); if [ -n "$ADMIN_HTML" ]; then ADMIN_DIR=$(dirname "$ADMIN_HTML"); if [ "$ADMIN_DIR" != "." ]; then mkdir -p .medusa/server/public/admin .medusa/server/build/public/admin; cp -a "$ADMIN_DIR"/. .medusa/server/public/admin/ || true; cp -a "$ADMIN_DIR"/. .medusa/server/build/public/admin/ || true; fi; fi; exit 0
